The villain/ narcissist was obviously the husband by a long shot compared to the women. He did this to his first wife and then to Michaela. The three main women were initially portrayed as sirens, stringing along men but the men were not blameless they chose to get involved too. Michaela was the most sympathetic of all the characters, ie the least narcissistic.

That’s the whole point. It wasn’t a fantasy show, but a study of very real, very toxic interpersonal relationships. The Siren song was a metaphor for power, manipulation and the allure these things can have on people. All of the women were using the “siren song” fantasy to feel in power in their life, but in the end, like often in life, they could not control an unfair reality.
